title: Expression in JSX
description: Embed a JavaScript expression inside a JSX element using curly braces.
problemStatement:
JavaScript inside HTML! Create a variable `name = "Progly"`. Inside your component's JSX, return a `<div>` that says `"Welcome, {name}!"` using curly braces.

**Requirement:** Embed the variable `name` directly into the JSX string.
hints: Anything inside `{}` in JSX is treated as JavaScript code.
